subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! Hearken unto My call, for verily it draweth you unto Mine horizon, and raiseth you up amongst My servants, and maketh mention of you through that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی اسمعوا ندائی انه یجذبکم الی افقی و یرفعکم بین عبادی و یذکرکم بما
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort
